audit_items.proof_trace: Sync-received data columns bypass length validation. Gossip path validates via verify_data_column_sidecar (peerdas_helpers.nim:362-364), but sync path only checks inclusion proof in checkColumnResponse (request_manager.nim:190), never calling verify_data_column_sidecar before adding to quarantine (line 437).
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends DataColumnSidecar over sync protocol with mismatched array lengths (e.g., column.len=6, kzg_proofs.len=4). Block processor calls verify_data_column_sidecar_kzg_proofs which passes mismatched arrays to verifyCellKzgProofBatch, causing out-of-bounds access or crash.
